best_unix_strategy: Use awk, perl, or ed to capture the real `## Backup Procedure` heading range under `# Maintenance`, delete that range through the next peer heading, and insert the captured block immediately before `## Scheduled Tasks` under `# Operations` while treating fenced content as opaque text.
rationale: Hybrid and unix both passed under both scorers, so the measured headline cell has no positive hybrid-minus-unix gap. Although the task is structurally realistic, this measured instance is not evidence of a unix failure class.
review_notes: The raw gemma reviewer response supplied the correct `both-pass/no-gap` label but a contradictory accepted flag; this artifact resolves the contradiction mechanically because no-gap candidates cannot be accepted as AST-structural corpus members.
